resolved_from_previous_audit: F-002: Heading font fallback (ACSS variable override)
F-011: About hero line length constrained
F-014: Home nav active state CSS added
F-016: Focus indicator color changed to blue
F-017: Home H1 includes Dr. Phil Good name
F-019: Text link underline affordance added

remaining_findings.title: Body text line length exceeds 75 characters on 3 pages
remaining_findings.description: Practice, Rescue, and Legacy pages have body text at ~93 estimated characters per line (836px width at 18px). Best practice for readability is 50-75 characters.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Add max-width: 680px to body text containers on these pages, similar to the About page fix.

remaining_findings.title: No hero CTA button on 3 pages
remaining_findings.description: About, Rescue, and Legacy pages only have a CTA at the bottom of the page, not in the hero section. Best practice for biography sites is to have a soft CTA in every hero viewport.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Add a secondary CTA button (e.g., 'Schedule a Visit' or 'Learn More') to the hero sections of these pages.

remaining_findings.title: Low image density on 4 pages
remaining_findings.description: Practice has 1 image, Rescue has 1, Legacy has 1, Contact has 0. Best-in-class biography sites use 3-5 images per page. Text-heavy pages feel less engaging.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 relevant photos per page: hospital interior/staff for Practice, rescue animals for Rescue, family photos for Legacy, hospital exterior for Contact.

remaining_findings.title: 16-22 undersized touch targets on tablet
remaining_findings.description: Tablet breakpoint has 16-22 interactive elements under 44px height. Most are footer links and inline text links. Mobile has improved to 4-10 per page.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Increase padding on footer links and inline text links at the tablet breakpoint (@media max-width: 1024px).

remaining_findings.title: No embedded contact form
remaining_findings.description: The Contact page has phone, email, and booking links but no embedded contact form. Many visitors prefer submitting a form rather than making a call.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Add a simple contact form (name, email, message) to the Contact page.

remaining_findings.title: News page outdated and unstyled
remaining_findings.description: The News page (post 770) has not been redesigned to match the new site style. Blog/content marketing is a best practice for biography sites.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Redesign News page with archive + single post templates matching site design system.

remaining_findings.title: No video content on site
remaining_findings.description: Top biography websites often include a short intro or welcome video. DrPhilGood.com has no video content anywhere.
remaining_findings.recommendation: Consider adding a 60-90 second intro video to the Home or About page.
